features: HIGH SPEED CHARGING AND DATA TRANSFER: The Status USB A to 8 Pin Adapter delivers 18W fast charging and high speed data transfer, ensuring your devices charge quickly and sync efficiently. Perfect for game controllers, cameras, and similar devices, this cable combines speed with reliability.

DURABLE AND LONG LASTING DESIGN: Built with a robust PVC coating and reinforced connectors, this adapter cable is designed to withstand daily use. Its durable construction ensures it remains reliable over time, making it a practical choice for your devices.

IDEAL FOR GAMING AND PHOTOGRAPHY: Whether you’re charging a game controller or transferring files from a camera, this cable provides fast, efficient performance. Its 1 metre length offers flexibility and convenience, allowing you to use your devices while they charge.

COMPATIBLE WITH MULTIPLE DEVICES: This adapter cable is designed to work with a wide range of devices, including game controllers, cameras, and other compatible electronics. Its versatility makes it a must have accessory for tech enthusiasts.

GREAT VALUE PACK OF 1: This pack includes one high quality USB A to 8 Pin Adapter Cable, offering excellent value. Whether for gaming, photography, or everyday use, this cable keeps your devices powered and connected.
